tokens.name: background
tokens.doc: Main bar and popup background color.

tokens.name: surface
tokens.doc: Normal widget or inactive surface color.

tokens.name: surface_elevated
tokens.doc: Focused, active, or raised surface color.

tokens.name: surface_hover
tokens.doc: Hover or highlighted surface color.

tokens.name: text
tokens.doc: Primary text color.

tokens.name: text_secondary
tokens.doc: Secondary body or label text color.

tokens.name: text_tertiary
tokens.doc: Tertiary text color for quieter labels.

tokens.name: muted
tokens.doc: Secondary, inactive, or unavailable text color.

tokens.name: muted_secondary
tokens.doc: Secondary muted tone for softer supporting content.

tokens.name: outside_month
tokens.doc: Calendar text color for days outside the active month.

tokens.name: accent
tokens.doc: Accent color.

tokens.name: accent_secondary
tokens.doc: Secondary accent color for supporting highlights.

tokens.name: accent_soft
tokens.doc: Softer accent color for subtle emphasis.

tokens.name: success
tokens.doc: Positive or healthy status color.

tokens.name: success_secondary
tokens.doc: Secondary positive color for supporting signals.

tokens.name: warning
tokens.doc: Warning status color.

tokens.name: orange
tokens.doc: Orange status color for low or degraded states.

tokens.name: error
tokens.doc: Error or critical status color.

tokens.name: danger
tokens.doc: Strong danger color for urgent attention.

tokens.name: border
tokens.doc: Normal border color.

tokens.name: border_strong
tokens.doc: Emphasized border color.

tokens.name: border_subtle
tokens.doc: Subtle or transparent border color.

tokens.name: selection_text
tokens.doc: Text color drawn on top of selected surfaces.

tokens.name: selection_background
tokens.doc: Background color used for selected surfaces.

tokens.name: transparent
tokens.doc: Fully transparent color.

tokens.name: overlay_outline
tokens.doc: Overlay outline color with alpha.

tokens.name: overlay_text
tokens.doc: High-contrast overlay glyph or text color.

tokens.name: today_button_border
tokens.doc: Border color used by the calendar today button.
